name: Chocolate Mints (Karin Brewer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and condensed milk slowly over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Stir in the peppermint flavoring.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
4. Allow to dry and set for several hours or overnight.
5. Store in a covered container; do not refrigerate.
